# Alogliptin 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Alogliptin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Alogliptin</strong> 目前有 <strong>6 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Alogliptin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Incresync is indicated as a second- or third-line treatment in adult patients aged 18 years and older with type-2 diabetes mellitus:  as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycaemic control...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（98.0%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（98.0%）</li>
<li>opsismodysplasia（97.8%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（97.8%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（97.5%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（96.5%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（96.5%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（96.4%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（96.3%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（96.1%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（87.6%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（86.9%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（63.6%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（63.5%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（63.3%）</li>
<li>congenital temporomandibular joint ankylosis（58.9%）</li>
<li>obsolete functional visual loss（58.7%）</li>
<li>ocular tuberculosis（58.2%）</li>
<li>pancreas, dorsal, agenesis of（58.0%）</li>
<li>obsolete breast fibroadenosis（57.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/alogliptin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
